content: [{"id": "header", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Accommodation Management", "col": 12}}, {"id": "quick_stats", "type": "number_card", "data": {"number_card_name": "Accommodation Overview", "col": 12, "cards": [{"name": "Total Accommodations", "label": "Total Accommodations", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Accommodation", "filters": [["Accommodation", "status", "=", "Active"]], "color": "Blue"}, {"name": "Occupied Rooms", "label": "Occupied Rooms", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Room", "filters": [["Room", "status", "=", "Occupied"]], "color": "Green"}, {"name": "Pending Inspections", "label": "Pending Inspections", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Accommodation Inspection", "filters": [["Accommodation Inspection", "status", "=", "Pending"]], "color": "Orange"}, {"name": "Overdue Tasks", "label": "Overdue Tasks", "function": "Count", "aggregate_function_based_on": "Supervisor Daily Task", "filters": [["Supervisor Daily Task", "completion_status", "=", "Pending"], ["Supervisor Daily Task", "due_date", "<", "Today"]], "color": "Red"}]}}, {"id": "accommodation_section", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Accommodation Management", "col": 12}}, {"id": "accommodation_shortcuts", "type": "shortcut", "data": {"shortcut_name": "Accommodation Management", "col": 6, "shortcuts": [{"label": "Accommodations", "name": "Accommodation", "type": "DocType", "icon": "home", "color": "blue"}, {"label": "Rooms", "name": "Room", "type": "DocType", "icon": "square", "color": "green"}, {"label": "Employee Assignments", "name": "Employee Accommodation Assignment", "type": "DocType", "icon": "user-check", "color": "purple"}]}}, {"id": "accommodation_chart", "type": "chart", "data": {"chart_name": "Room Occupancy Status", "col": 6, "chart_type": "Donut", "filters": [], "based_on": "status", "document_type": "Room", "group_by_type": "Count", "time_interval": "Yearly", "timespan": "Last Year", "color": "Blue"}}, {"id": "maintenance_section", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Maintenance & Inspections", "col": 12}}, {"id": "maintenance_shortcuts", "type": "shortcut", "data": {"shortcut_name": "Maintenance & Inspections", "col": 6, "shortcuts": [{"label": "Maintenance Entries", "name": "Maintenance Entry", "type": "DocType", "icon": "tool", "color": "orange"}, {"label": "Inspections", "name": "Accommodation Inspection", "type": "DocType", "icon": "search", "color": "blue"}, {"label": "Asset Logs", "name": "Asset Log", "type": "DocType", "icon": "clipboard", "color": "green"}]}}, {"id": "maintenance_chart", "type": "chart", "data": {"chart_name": "Monthly Maintenance Costs", "col": 6, "chart_type": "Bar", "filters": [], "based_on": "maintenance_date", "document_type": "Maintenance Entry", "group_by_type": "Sum", "group_by_based_on": "cost", "time_interval": "Monthly", "timespan": "Last 6 months", "color": "Orange"}}, {"id": "tasks_section", "type": "header", "data": {"text": "Daily Operations", "col": 12}}, {"id": "tasks_shortcuts", "type": "shortcut", "data": {"shortcut_name": "Daily Operations", "col": 6, "shortcuts": [{"label": "Daily Tasks", "name": "Supervisor Daily Task", "type": "DocType", "icon": "check-square", "color": "blue"}, {"label": "Checklist Items", "name": "Inspection Checklist Item", "type": "DocType", "icon": "list", "color": "green"}]}}, {"id": "tasks_chart", "type": "chart", "data": {"chart_name": "Task Completion Rate", "col": 6, "chart_type": "Line", "filters": [], "based_on": "task_date", "document_type": "Supervisor Daily Task", "group_by_type": "Count", "time_interval": "Weekly", "timespan": "Last 3 months", "color": "Green"}}]
